prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约6711→6608→6188→7038→7140，整体呈波动后移趋势，2025年基准约7140名；近两年累计后移约952名，显示竞争持续加剧；本省物理类计划2021年572人、2022年597人、2023年614人、2024年618人、2025年620人，逐年小幅扩招；2026年计划643人，较2025年扩招约3.7%，扩招幅度为近年最大，对位次有上推作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流综合类高校；软科主榜2026年第27名，近年排名稳定在第23–27位区间，属全国顶尖高校行列；近年声誉评价偏负面：2022年涉及师德师风事件，2024年存在录取断档信号，2025年重庆高考个别专业出现投档线异常；2026年原校长被查事件引发学术声誉关注；抖音热度排名第85位（一般），短视频曝光量中等偏低，报考关注度未出现明显升温；拥有13个A-及以上学科：冶金工程A+、护理学A+、材料科学与工程A、临床医学A-、计算机科学与技术A-、交通运输工程A-、土木工程A-、机械工程A-、控制科学与工程A-等，学科实力雄厚，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门专业持续高热推荐，中南大学在上述领域均有A-级学科支撑；物理类考生2026年约34.7万人，较2025年32.0万人增加约8.4%，竞争明显加剧；中南大学位于湖南省长沙市，为本省唯一985高校，本地招生占比高（2025年物理类620人），本省考生报考意愿强烈，地域偏好对位次有支撑作用。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026年扩招约3.7%对位次的上推作用、本省物理类考生增加约8.4%带来的竞争加剧、学校声誉偏负面对报考热度的轻微抑制，以及优势学科与热门专业热度的正向吸引，在2025年基准7140名基础上预计位次继续后移；预测最低位次约7329名，区间6829–7829名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约7329名，区间6829–7829名。位次在区间下限（6829名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（临床医学八年制、口腔医学、计算机拔尖班）；位次在区间中段（约7329名附近）建议以二档为主，兼顾一档冲刺和三档保底；位次在区间上限（7829名以外）应以三档专业为主，稳妥填报。中南大学学科实力均衡，建议结合个人兴趣与学科评估等级综合选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 6711 → 6608 → 6188 → 7038 → 7140, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. The 2025 baseline is about 7140. Over the past two years, the ranking has shifted backward by about 952 places, indicating intensifying competition. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 572 in 2021, 597 in 2022, 614 in 2023, 618 in 2024, and 620 in 2025, with a slight annual increase. The 2026 plan is 643, an increase of about 3.7% compared to 2025, the largest expansion in recent years, which will push the ranking upward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class comprehensive university. Ranked 27th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a stable position in the 23–27 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of national universities. Recent reputation evaluations have been somewhat negative: in 2022, there was an incident involving teacher ethics; in 2024, there were signals of admission gaps; in 2025, some majors in Chongqing experienced abnormal admission score lines; in 2026, the former president was investigated, raising concerns about academic reputation. Douyin popularity ranking is 85th (average), with medium-low short video exposure, and no significant increase in application attention. It has 13 A- or above disciplines: Metallurgical Engineering A+, Nursing A+, Materials Science and Engineering A, Clinical Medicine A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, Transportation Engineering A-, Civil Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, etc., with strong disciplinary strength, which strongly attracts applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, and Central South University has A- level disciplinary support in these fields. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% from 320,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Central South University is located in Changsha, Hunan Province, the only 985 university in the province, with a high proportion of local enrollment (620 in Physics Category in 2025). Local examinees have a strong willingness to apply, and regional preference supports the ranking.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating backward trend of historical rankings, the upward push effect of the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 3.7%, the intensified competition due to an 8.4% increase in local Physics Category examinees, the slight suppression of application enthusiasm due to negative reputation, and the positive attraction of advantageous disciplines and popular majors, the ranking is expected to continue moving backward from the 2025 baseline of 7140. The predicted minimum ranking is about 7329, with a range of 6829–7829.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Program)
- Stomatology (5+3 Integrated Program)
- Computer Science and Technology (Top Talent Base Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Computer Class
- Software Engineering
- Electronic Information Class
- Automation Class (Automation and Electrical Class)
- Clinical Medicine Class (Five-Year Program)
- Mathematics Class.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Materials Class (Metallurgical Materials Class)
- Mechanical Class
- Energy and Power Class (Energy Class)
- Transportation Class
- Civil Engineering Class (Civil Safety Class)
- Chemical and Pharmaceutical Class (Chemical, Biological, and Environmental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 7329, with a range of 6829–7829. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 6829) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program, Stomatology, Computer Top Talent Class). Candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (around 7329) are advised to prioritize Tier 2, while also considering Tier 1 as a sprint and Tier 3 as a safety. Candidates with rankings at the upper end of the range (outside 7829) should mainly choose Tier 3 majors and fill in steadily. Central South University has balanced disciplinary strength; it is recommended to combine personal interests with discipline evaluation levels for comprehensive selection.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年历史类大幅缩招28.6%对位次的下推作用、本省历史类考生增加约31.2%带来的竞争显著加剧、学校声誉偏负面影响有限、以及法学/中文类专业热度稳定，在2025年基准996名基础上预计位次前移；预测最低位次约840名，区间714–966名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1056 → 1081 → 1096 → 911 → 996, showing a fluctuating trend. In 2024, it significantly advanced to 911th place, then retreated to 996th in 2025; the baseline for 2025 is about 996th place. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 31 in 2021, 32 in 2022, 31 in 2023, 46 in 2024 (substantial expansion), and 35 in 2025 (adjustment); the 2026 plan is only 25, a reduction of about 28.6% compared to 2025, which is significant and will push the ranking downward (making admission easier).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class comprehensive university; ranked 27th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, belonging to the top tier of national universities. In recent years, reputation evaluations have been somewhat negative, but mainly related to events in the science and engineering fields, with limited impact on History Category applications. Douyin popularity ranking is 85th (average), with no obvious signs of increased application attention. Advantageous disciplines related to liberal arts, such as Marxist Theory (A-) and Management Science and Engineering (A-), support economics, management, and law majors. Advantageous disciplines like Nursing (A+) and Clinical Medicine (A-) do not directly recruit History Category students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major is recommended but with differentiated caution; Chinese Language and Literature major is recommended. In 2026, there will be approximately 187,000 History Category examinees, an increase of about 31.2% from 143,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Central South University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, and is the only 985 university in the province. History Category examinees in the province have a strong willingness to apply, and regional preference supports the ranking.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the downward push on ranking due to the significant 28.6% reduction in History Category enrollment in 2026, the sharp increase in competition from about 31.2% more provincial History Category examinees, the limited negative impact of school reputation, and the stable popularity of law/Chinese language majors, the ranking is expected to advance from the 2025 baseline of 996th place. The predicted minimum ranking is about 840th, with a range of 714–966.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Law
- Finance (Economics and Management Category).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- None (History Category has only 3 enrollment majors, all listed in Tier 1 and Tier 2).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 840th, with a range of 714–966. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 714th) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Law and Finance majors; those in the middle of the range (around 840th) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 Chinese Language and Literature, while also considering Tier 1 as a reach; those at the upper end of the range (beyond 966th) should fill in cautiously. Central South University has few enrollment majors in History Category, so it is recommended to choose based on personal interests and career plans.
